age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Master’s degree in Anthropology/Sociology/Cultural Studies with at least 55% marks, NET/M.Phil./Ph.D. qualification, Ethnographic research experience in fieldwork/interviews/transcription/data collection and analysis, Qualitative data analysis and software skill, proficiency in academic writing transcribing, Proficiency in Hindi/Mundari languages
qualification.details: Master’s degree in Anthropology/Sociology/Cultural Studies with at least 55% marks. NET/M.Phil./Ph.D. qualification. Ethnographic research experience in fieldwork/interviews/transcription/data collection and analysis. Qualitative data analysis and software skill. Proficiency in academic writing transcribing. Proficiency in Hindi/Mundari languages.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Hyderabad Research Assistant Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 30-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Hyderabad to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download IIT Hyderabad Research Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Research Assistant position at IIT Hyderabad?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the Research Assistant position at IIT Hyderabad is 30th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Assistant role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master’s degree in Anthropology, Sociology, or Cultural Studies with at least 55% marks, along with NET/M.Phil./Ph.D. qualification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Research Assistant position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 37,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Research Assistant post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Research Assistant position at IIT Hyderabad.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is entirely online through the official IIT Hyderabad website.

faq.question: Q6. Are there any application fees for the Research Assistant position?
faq.answer: No, there are no application fees mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What are the key skills required for this role?
faq.answer: Essential skills include ethnographic research experience, qualitative data analysis, proficiency in academic writing, and knowledge of Hindi/Mundari languages.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Research Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an online interview followed by document verification.

faq.question: Q9. When is the expected joining date for the selected candidate?
faq.answer: The expected joining date for the selected Research Assistant is 1st August 2026.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the "Important Links" section of this article, under the "Official Notification PDF" heading.
